title: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Q1 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Q1 2021 earnings call transcript for VKTX. Analysts predicted an earnings per share of -$0.91. Koyfin estimates pointed to a Q1 GAAP loss per share of $1.03, widening from a loss of $0.4 a year earlier. Revenue was expected to remain zero as the company continued to operate in the clinical development stage without commercial sales. During the first quarter, Viking continued enrolling patients in its Phase 2b VOYAGE study for VK2809, and added new clinical sites in both the U.S. and outside the U.S. The company also continued enrollment in a Phase 1 trial evaluating VK0214 for the treatment of X-linked adrenoleukodystrophy. Research and development expenses were $11.5 million compared to $8.0 million in the prior year period. General and administrative expenses were $2.7 million compared to $3 million. At March 31st, 2021, Viking held cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments totaling $241.7 million.
